title: koeleria cristata subsp. transiliensis
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. transiliensis, also known as the Transilvanian June grass, is a subspecies of the Koeleria cristata plant, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata subsp. transiliensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
